extract: Steel Wing (Japanese: はがねのつばさ Steel Wing) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM47 from Generation II to Generation IV, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM51 from Generation VI to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM30 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. It is the signature move of Skarmory in Generation V, but other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding.
